title: Avoid LinkLayer TX priority inversion
description: Python LinkLayer holds _tx_lock while enqueueing, running CAD retries, and draining. A later ROUTING/ACK send cannot enter the priority queue while an earlier BULK send waits, so bulk may transmit first and the higher-priority packet may expire before enqueue. Redesign serialization so radio operations remain single-flight while priority enqueue remains responsive. Discovered reviewing convergence commit d422a03b; outside frozen reconciliation.
